content.en:
Somewhere in the source sea.

Ye Tian and the Ice Han Lord and the Holy Peak Lord came here, but the other Legendary Realm Lords and the people who guarded the legion didn't know.

At present, Ye Tian does not want to reveal the news here.

"It's a barren area of the source sea!"

Ye Tian finally knew why no one had discovered the anomaly here.

The barren area of the Source Sea refers to the fact that no heaven and earth, eternal realm, or treasure land has never been born, and there is not even a so-called forbidden land.

The barren area is almost the same as the void area, there is nothing, there is nothing, and even the origin in the source sea is thinner than the other regions.

There used to be many people who thought that there must be a treasure or a world in the barren area, and spent endless years exploring it, but in the end they found nothing.

After countless years of verification, the barren area has no value, and no one has come~.

"Even in the barren area, no one comes here, so there is a temporary anomaly here, and it will not be discovered!" Lord Ice Han said: "In fact, before the appearance of the Gray Mist Stone Statue, this was not a barren area, but after the arrival of the Gray Mist Region, the barren area was born, perhaps because the Source Sea Origin was afraid of rejecting the Gray Mist Stone Statue, so no resources would be born here." -"

Ye Tian nodded, and also agreed with this statement.

"This is it!"

Lord Ice Han pointed to a barren area in front of him and said.

In fact, without being reminded by Lord Bing Han, Ye Tian also sensed the abnormality of this area at this moment, and a terrifying aura spread out from this area, and this aura made even a Legendary Lord of the Perfection Realm feel terrified.

Moreover, he could not even probe the source of this breath.

Immediately, a punch slammed into the barren area in front of him.

Bang!!!

The void shattered, but nothing changed.

He still didn't find the Gray Mist Stone Statue.

According to the abnormal changes here, it only takes about 100,000 eternal years, and this place will inevitably be discovered.

But let Ye Tian continue to wait, he didn't want to.

He pondered for a while, then took out the Eternal Supreme Treasure Jialan Leaf, and urged the power of Jialan Leaf, trying to use Jialan Leaf to perceive the Gray Mist Stone Statue.

Jia Lan Ye is the eternal treasure born in the source sea, and the origin of the source sea rejects the gray mist stone statue, perhaps Jia Lanye can cause the reaction of the gray mist stone statue, so that he can perceive the space-time location of the gray fog stone statue.

Airplanes!!!

The power of Jialanye is constantly being released.

At a certain moment, Jia Lanye was suppressed by a terrifying force and trembled constantly.

"Found it!"

Ye Tian sensed the location of the Gray Mist Stone Statue and seized the opportunity to tear apart time and space in an instant, casting a void step into an unknown space-time realm.

The Ice Han Lord and the Holy Peak Lord reacted one step slower, and they did not enter, so they could only look at each other at the outer interface.

Although they knew that they could use the Eternal Arcana to cause repulsion from the Grey Mist Stone Statue and thus enter the plane where the Grey Mist Stone Statue was located, they did not have the Eternal Arcana at all.

Wow!

And empty, Ye Tian appeared.

This was obviously another copy of Ye Tian's body, and Lord Binghan and the others were not surprised.

At this time, the Holy Peak Lord asked, "Endless Lord, have you seen the Gray Mist Stone Statue?"

"See!" Ye Tian nodded.

The Holy Peak Lord said again: "Endless Lord, the inside of this Gray Mist Stone Statue is empty, and the only place to enter is that crack, however, the crack of the Gray Mist Stone Statue is very dangerous, and we were hit hard as soon as we entered, but Endless Lord, your strength is very strong, maybe you can really break into it." "

"Don't worry, I'll observe outside the gray mist stone statue first!"

Ye Tian said.

Outside the Grey Mist Stone Statue.

Ye Tian stood here, feeling the terrifying power emanating from the Gray Mist Stone Statue, it was indeed difficult for the ordinary Eternal Realm to get close to here, once he approached the Gray Mist Stone Statue, he was afraid that he would be easily wiped out by this power.

However, this gray mist stone statue is indeed an unimaginable treasure.

At this moment, Ye Tian cultivated here for a while, and found that the fusion speed of the will and the innate eternal rules was several times faster

Of course, the Grey Mist Stone is more than that, there are other chances.

Ye Tian kept shuttling around the Gray Mist Stone Statue, and found that the appearance of the Gray Mist Stone Statue was like the earth, and many things were born.

Ye Tian found that these things were very precious to the Eternal Realm, and some treasures were even of great use to the Legendary Lord.

So, he collected all these resources.

"This should be a treasure that has been bred here by the power of the Gray Mist Stone Statue for a long time, and the treasures here are piled up alone, so it is not in vain. "

After a long time, Ye Tian had almost collected all the resources on the appearance of the Gray Mist Stone Statue.

At this time, he came to the crack in the chest of the Gray Mist Stone Statue.

He didn't go in immediately, but silently contemplated the crack not far from the crack.

In his perception, this crack was clearly attacked.

It was hard for him to imagine what kind of strength the person who shot was able to launch such a terrifying attack, he was far inferior, and even the average Legendary Realm Lord was far inferior

"In this attack, you can't even feel the will and the innate eternal rules. "

Ye Tian frowned, very puzzled by this attack.

Even if it is the Eternal Force, the shadow of the will and the innate eternal rules can be seen in its power, but this attack does not seem to contain it.

There is no holy place.

A copy of Ye Tian's body came to consult the Frostless Lord, the half-step Legendary Realm Lord.

"Lord Frostless, I saw a trace in a ruin, this trace was caused by an attack, but I have never seen the breath of will and innate eternal rules on it, but it must be an attack made by a very powerful being, and there is no breath of the eternal force, what kind of attack is this?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Oh, no attacks of rule or will, and no breath of the Eternal Force......"

The Frostless Lord was slightly surprised, and then pondered.

After a while, Lord Wufrost asked again, "Does that trace really exist in the current time and space, if you are in the location of that trace, it's a pity to continue to try to comprehend, to comprehend from the perspective of time and space, not to comprehend its power." "

From the perspective of time and space?

Ye Tianxuan immediately comprehended this rift in the manner of the Frostless Lord, and he was immediately surprised to find that this rift did not exist, and he could not comprehend this rift at all from the perspective of time and space.

.....

So, he said truthfully, "Lord Frostless, I can't even comprehend that rift, as if it doesn't exist anymore. Even if the Eternal Arcana couldn't be touched, it wouldn't not exist, but the rift seemed to really don't exist, as if the rift I saw was false, but I had obviously sensed a lot of things before. "

At this time, the Frostless Lord smiled and said, "I'm roughly sure that the trail you saw should be an attack from the Eternal Master. "

"Eternal Master, what's that?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Frostless Lord said: "The Eternal Master is the end of everything, the ultimate end of cultivation, the end of all legends, and the ultimate goal of the Lords of the Legendary Realm is also the Eternal Master, they are the beings who control all time and space. It can be said that they have jumped out of the timeline and can even travel to the past and the future, because their attacks do not exist in any plane and plane, and they have this trait. For them, there is no meaning to any will, rules, physical strength, etc. "

"Traveling through the past and the future?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

The Frostless Lord nodded and said, "However, although they can travel to the past, they can't change the past, otherwise it will cause the collapse of time and space, and even they themselves will not be able to bear it, and the entire Void Region will suppress them." But they can come to the future in one step, which is not restricted, for example, if they see that a certain treasure is produced somewhere in the future, they can go to the future in one step and snatch this treasure. Therefore, if some amazing anti-heaven treasure is born in the Void Region, it is very likely that several Eternal Masters will travel through the timeline to snatch and fight, leaving traces. In today's void area, there are still many such traces, and you may see the traces in them. "

"Thank you, Lord Frostless, for your doubts!"

Ye Tian completely understood nine at this moment. _
